completion_promises.evidence: All 5 models (SourceDocument, GenerationTarget, EvaluationCriterion, MetadataField, GoalConfig) are Pydantic BaseModel subclasses with field names and types matching API-domain-config.md exactly. SourceDocument has {file_pattern: str, mode: Literal, notes: str}. GenerationTarget has {category: str, type: Literal, count: int}. Verified by TestAC002_PydanticModelsMatchContract (6 tests) which inspects model_fields.keys() and runtime types.

SourceDocument.mode is typed as Literal['standard', 'vlm'] on line 51 of domain_config/models.py. 'standard' and 'vlm' are accepted; 'ocr' and any other string raise ValidationError. Verified by TestAC003_SourceDocumentModeLiteral (4 tests) and TestSourceDocument.test_valid_modes_accepted + test_invalid_mode_rejected (9 tests).

GenerationTarget.type is typed as Literal['reasoning', 'direct'] on line 62 of domain_config/models.py. 'reasoning' and 'direct' are accepted; any other string raises ValidationError. Verified by TestAC004_GenerationTargetTypeLiteral (3 tests) and TestGenerationTarget.test_valid_types_accepted + test_invalid_type_rejected (7 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: [x] `EvaluationCriterion.name` validated as Python identifier + not keyword
completion_promises.evidence: EvaluationCriterion has a @field_validator('name') on lines 78-91 of domain_config/models.py that calls str.isidentifier() and keyword.iskeyword(). Invalid identifiers like 'socratic-approach' raise ValueError matching 'identifier'. Keywords like 'class' raise ValueError matching 'keyword'. Verified by TestAC005_EvaluationCriterionNameValidation (6 tests) which explicitly tests isidentifier() and iskeyword() paths, plus TestEvaluationCriterion (16 tests) covering all Python keywords.

GoalValidationError on lines 25-36 of domain_config/models.py is a subclass of Exception with __init__(self, section: str, message: str) that stores both as instance attributes. Verified by TestAC006_GoalValidationErrorException (5 tests) which checks issubclass(GoalValidationError, Exception), hasattr for both 'section' and 'message', inspects constructor signature, and tests raise/catch behaviour.
